channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: garrytan /gstack | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

item.title: hardikpandya /stop-slop | N/A | N/A
item.description: A skill file for removing AI tells from prose

item.title: Axorax /awesome-free-apps | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Curated list of the best free apps for PC and mobile

item.title: shiyu-coder /Kronos | Python | N/A
item.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

item.title: moeru-ai /airi | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

item.title: Leonxlnx /taste-skill | Shell | N/A
item.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

item.title: anthropics /claude-cookbooks | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

item.title: paperless-ngx /paperless-ngx | Python | N/A
item.description: A community-supported supercharged document management system: scan, index and archive all your documents

item.title: Fincept-Corporation /FinceptTerminal | Python | N/A
item.description: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.

item.title: multica-ai /andrej-karpathy-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

item.title: manaflow-ai /cmux | Swift | N/A
item.description: Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for AI coding agents

item.title: colbymchenry /codegraph | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

item.title: mukul975 /Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills | Python | N/A
item.description: 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0

item.title: affaan-m /ECC | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

item.title: rohitg00 /ai-engineering-from-scratch | Python | N/A
item.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

item.title: anthropics /knowledge-work-plugins | Python | N/A
item.description: Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork

item.title: Lum1104 /Understand-Anything | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
